responsibilities: Design, train, and evaluate deep learning models for image classification, object detection, and segmentation tasks at scale
Build and optimize computer vision pipelines that process images and video streams for real-time inference applications
Implement data augmentation, preprocessing, and annotation workflows to improve model accuracy and reduce labeling costs
Fine-tune pretrained convolutional and transformer-based vision models on domain-specific datasets to improve task performance
Optimize and quantize trained models for deployment on edge devices using TensorRT and ONNX runtime
Conduct rigorous model evaluation using precision, recall, mAP, and IoU metrics to validate production readiness
Collaborate with product and engineering teams to integrate computer vision models into production applications and APIs
Monitor deployed vision models for performance drift and retrain pipelines to maintain accuracy over time
Research and prototype state-of-the-art computer vision techniques to solve novel business and product problems
